name: Endpoints Enrolled in MDM
description: Ensures all corporate endpoints are enrolled in mobile device management
query: SELECT e.id, e.email, e.name FROM employees e WHERE e.status = 'active' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM endpoints ep WHERE ep.user_email = e.work_email AND ep.mdm_enrolled = true)
remediation: Enroll all corporate devices in MDM (Jamf, Kandji, Intune, etc.) for security monitoring and policy enforcement.
